ideation: This sequence aims to capture the gentle, unfolding nature of a blossom. The animation will feature both arms moving in a slow, graceful arc, mimicking the delicate opening of a flower's petals.  The movement will be subtle yet expressive, focusing on the fluidity of the motion rather than sharp, dramatic changes.  The starting posture is a relaxed position, with the arms gently raised. Then, the arms gracefully extend outward and upward, followed by a slight pause before returning to a relaxed state. This will give a sense of blossoming and gentle unfolding.  Throughout the sequence, the wrists will maintain a neutral position, keeping the focus on the graceful arc of the arms.

frames.beat: arms gently rise, like a bud preparing to open
arms extend outward and upward, petals unfurling
a brief pause at full bloom, serene and open
arms begin to gracefully fold back inward
arms return to rest, a flower gently closed
